Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep consultation responses attached to the record that becomes a booking.
  • Track virtual intake, virtual prenatal, and in-person prenatal visits on one timeline without extra notes.
  • Hold the 37-week on-call window and postpartum check-in on the same client record.
